holdings.infoBox: XJR is an equity ETF with a total of 575 individual holdings. The top holdings are BLK CSH FND TREASURY SL AGENCY stock at N/A, Semtech at N/A, Sanmina at N/A, Viavi Solutions at N/A, and FormFactor at N/A.

overview.description: The iShares ESG Select Screened S&P Small-Cap ETF (XJR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of US small-caps screened for sustainability and excluding those with exposure to certain controversial business activities. XJR was launched on Sep 22, 2020 and is issued by BlackRock.
